nasb.text: When the people saw him, they praised their god, for they said, “Our god has given our enemy into our hands, Even the destroyer of our country, Who has slain many of us.”

esv.text: And when the people saw him, they praised their god. For they said, “Our god has given our enemy into our hand, the ravager of our country, who has killed many of us.”

cnv.text: 眾人看見了參孫，就讚美他們的神，說：“我們的神把我們的仇敵，就是那毀壞我們的地，又殺死我們很多人的，交在我們手中了。”

ccb.text: 众人看见参孙，就赞美他们的神明，说：“我们的神把仇敌交在我们手中了，他曾毁坏我们的田地，杀死我们许多人。”
